name: Nori Lamb Surprise
recipeInstructions:
To prepare the sauce: Combine sugar, water, ginger, lemon grass, garlic, and chillies in a pot. Boil until the mixture reduces to form a thin syrup. Strain and discard solids. Add chopped mint, coriander, fish sauce, and sesame oil. Mix well.
To prepare the chili capsicum: Blend red pimento, onion, vinegar, red chillies, and sugar in a blender until smooth. Mix this with the sauce.
Prepare the lamb loin by butterflying it with a sharp knife and flattening. Divide the filling ingredients among each loin, following the order listed. Roll up tightly and wrap one sheet of nori around the loin. To cook: Melt butter and oil in a non-stick pan. Place the rolled loin in the pan and turn occasionally until cooked through, about 5-10 minutes at 190C. Serve with rice and fresh vegetables. For the egg roll, prepare as an omelette, roll, and cut into thin strips.
